Guard Captain`s Mallet  
 

Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 20
DMG: 11 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
DEX: +6 AGI: +6 HP: +45 ENDUR: +20
WT: 5.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

8 posts
Used one of these on my ranger. This in offhand, jade mace in main, then i got my offhand epic and binned the jade mace, putting this in prime, all i can say is wow. With 40% haste this thing is a killing machine, i generally play with this and my Toxi axe depending on whether we have some additional speed in the group (ie if we have a chanter or a shaman i use hammer, if not axe).

234 posts
Haste doesn't decrease the delay of your weapon. It increases your number of attacks.

i just got one tonight, i went to FM and was the MT, with my defiance and this along with FBSS mega combo, when i had the canter haste, screen was so spammed up i couldnt read what my friend was telling me, now i know i people like FBSS better that TBB!
▲ Page top
Oh man some people are dumb
QuoteReply
# Feb 24 2002 at 4:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592253674373
4 posts
Lol, i like how a lvl 60 enchanter thinks he knows all there is to know about melee.

Ok first of, frostbringer is better than this. Its insane to think otherwise. Yes this has a slightly better ratio... but frostbringer has a proc... and with a dex buff it will proc 5 times per fight which is very important for damage and for aggro. Procs are very important for aggro on tanks... in my guild we had 56 warrior using a guard captain's mallet and a LSoEE, then we had a 54 warrior using a Frostbringer and Ven Axe.

When the 56 warrior was the main tank he would always ***** and cry because i would steal aggro with my TStaff. But i rarely ever stole aggro when the 54 warrior was tanking. They both had the same haste as well. A 56 warrior should be able to keep aggro off of a 53 monk (i was 53 at the time, 55 now). Frostbringer is indeed a better weapon, for both damage and aggro.

and an 11/20 is not better than a 10/19... i dont know what kind of crack your smoking, but it must be good.

also, a monk shouldnt use this when they can have a 38/40 IFS? thats crap man... IFS sucks hardcore i used one for a long time... and epic/SoS is better does way more damage than tstaff (2hb for monks really isnt that good, not with all the new h2h and 1hb weps out). As a monk, using this mallet + a SoS would definitely outdamage IFS... so pay no attention to this guy.

If you have the choice, get a frostbringer... especially is your job is to keep aggro.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 30 2002 at 4:23 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) NEVER take procs into effect when choosing a weapon
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 29 2002 at 1:11 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) 11/20 wep Ratio=1.818
RE: Oh man some people are dumb
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2002 at 11:21 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595780131429
464 posts
That's not factoring in the Damage Bonus, which will make a faster weapon better.
▲ Page top
RE: Oh man some people are dumb
QuoteReply
# Feb 28 2002 at 1:46 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592253674373
4 posts
my bad i didnt see he said pure dmg/del ratio... but what the heck is the point of even mentioning pure damage delay ratio... if yur just going by that then wurmslayer is better than frostbringer and guard captains mallet by far....

but pure dmg/del ratio is absolutely pointless to the effectiveness of the weapon, especially when he is posting about mainhand weapons... so it was a stupid point to acknowledge.

__DEL__1591761509905
92 posts
would the frostbringer do more dmg than this with the dmg bonus?
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Aug 11 2002 at 3:58 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) this is also only 5k on our sever frosty is a 15k sword um do the math this or that.......
Math whizzes
QuoteReply
# Dec 15 2001 at 9:53 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1595780120473
2 posts
Regarding pure dmg/dly ratio (yes, that's the same type of measure as damage per second,) an 11/20 weapon is better than a 12/22 weapon (frostbringer) but only by a little. 11/20 is also better than a 10/19, but 10/18 is better than 11/20, though again not by much.

Make your own decisions on how much faith you want to put into a proc to maintain aggro, but a faster weapon in primary hand, barring procs, is easier to maintain aggro with, all other things being the same. I'm thinking like a tank about getting and keeping aggro, rangers or bards might look at weapons differently.

6 agi, 45 hps, for a tank, is very nice, worth sacrificing a few net AC over the frostbringer, easily imo.

Anyway, defiance has 10 ac, that's swell, but 9/19 is a ***** ratio, really ****** Sarnak parrying blade is 10 ac also, and 16/30 is not terrible for offhand, but faster is better when you want to get and keep aggro. I'd like to use a 10/18 primary and FB secondary, regarding weapons in the sub-30k range.

11/20 1hb in the hands of a monk is fine, but stupid, considering they can get a 38/40 IFS pretty cheaply now, at least on Inny, and have much much better damage output. 5.0 lb 1h weapon in a monk's hand is also silly. 5.0 lb 1h weapon with 20 delay will run a warrior with 150 stamina and shissar down to nothing in a 60 second fight, not that the yellow bar matters much for someone like that. 12/23 5 ac 1hb is ***** compared to this, even if it was rotting and no drop and you paid 0pp for it. Little differences in dmg and dly make for big differences in results, enter why jade mace is still more valuable than lamentation, and has no stats to go with it.

Personal note: Mandicus, seems that nearly all your posts are dumb and/or ignorant, please keep it up, I like to leave allakhazam and inny.com with a smile. P.S. Center arena is camped!! You left and right groups stay away from our pulls!
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 06 2002 at 10:02 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) lol.. where to start, 1) IFS sucks ****, 2) this and any dropable secondary/primary under 80k is not better than tstaff 3) Tstaff is VERY good until you can get nodrop or very high end 2hb/1hb/h2h 4) you call this other guy dumb, look at your post, you talk about ******* newb weapons and ****, thanks. :) bye
RE: Math whizzes
QuoteReply
# Nov 28 2002 at 8:10 PM Rating: Decent
bobtheking
Scholar
77 posts
I would like to point out as a monk that an IFS does not "suck ****". It is slow but puts out very nice damage, very easy to keep off aggro with it. Haven't had a chance to compare to a Tstaff, but it beats most low end weapons for damage. I've used two SoS's, a SoS jade mace, two wu's sticks, a wu stick KD, two KD's, two jade maces, two whitened treant fists. I found the IFS to be better than any of those combo's, only thing that came close to the dps with the least aggro was the two SoS's. BTW, notice I said low end weapons, stuff that anyone can reasonably acquire.
____________________________
"Cheaters never win, winners never get caught."

#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 13 2002 at 10:38 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) pls shut up....u don't even know what a warrior or a monk needs. and yet a chanter is trying to tell us warriors how to player our warriors hehe. WHAT A MORON
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 13 2002 at 10:42 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) BTW A ajde mace is a 3k 1hb while lammy still goes fer 3-4k.... a JM is 9/18 lammy is 9/19 with +6str +more overal dmg +6sta added life and +20hp which warriors need... a Jade mace is more directed at a monk...not a warrior.. and pls don't leave any more posts. You have no damn idea about DMG over time and yet you preach you do. Nah go mez some monsters Pu$$y

I have one of these on my 49 monk. It is ok but 17 k get real the wait is like 5 pounds and any high lv WAR or MT looks at the speed 20 del 11 dam rocks but 18/ 9 is better stas dose not matter when your getting the best buffs in the game. All so there is way better 1hb items dropping out of SOL that I got for free ( 12dam 23 del 5ac 2 str) I would not pay more then 3k for this if that.

# Nov 20 2001 at 8:54 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752925968
Scholar
48 posts
This is imo one pretty Awesome piece of 1HB, I as a Pally am using a Darkmetal Holy Water Sprinkler, one of them Pre-Kunark nodrop planar drops, that's 16/29 wiht a bonus of 4 Wisdom. Now the damage on this baby might be less, but the delay is nothing short of perfect, with my Shield of the Seneschal, I can almost hit/bash nonstop, & with a haste item (or/and spell) well... beware the spam. I'm using it until I find a buyer.. :)

Summoneaa Saindiva
55th hand Knight of Tunare
Glorious Order of Dharg
Bertoxx
▲ Page top
Great weap
QuoteReply
# Nov 04 2001 at 1:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1599437907616
View User Forum
23 posts
I was with a group in Chardok a few weeks ago (48 shaman, 54 cleric, 53 mage, 55 wizzie, 55 bard, 54 ranger), and we took down Di'ouz, who dropped this delicious piece of weaponry. At first, I truly wasn't going to sell this, and I gave it to my 19th level bard, who isn't advancing too quickly. I had originally thought of it as a 5k weapon, nothing more. However, I found out, through friends, that it's worth 15-20k, and yes, I did sell this for 17k, which, to me, is worth much more for my spells than a weapon, considering my 50+ spells coming up will cost me more than previous spells, and will be worth more to me than the weapon. However, despite the weight, this is an amazing monk weapon, and it's a wonderful weapon for any melee class, due to the agility, dexterity and hit point bonus.

Just my 2cp.

RE: Great weap

# Mar 18 2003 at 9:57 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591780032369

▲ Page top
DPM
QuoteReply
# Oct 27 2001 at 9:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752591141
18 posts
Figure the DPM (Damage Per Minute) on this weapon vs some of the others out there. All I can tell you is that from switching my polished velium warsword (10/19 1hs) for this weapon, I slightly increased my damage output according to all parses I took, AND added 45 hps! I'll use this, thanks, and I am a 60! And no, I DONT want my epic, thanks! This and a Frostbringer offhand do more damage per minute than using warrior epic! And using defiance and Frostbringer offhand would be 80 points DPM lower, FYI, according to most benchmark apps.
▲ Page top
RE: DPM
QuoteReply

__DEL__1623630270841
251 posts
Warrior epic may have lower "DPM", but they have the nice agro increaser procs

3,705 posts
This has a better ratio that the highly prized lamentation. Yes, it is a little heavy for a monk, but seems like it would serve any of the other tank classes nicely, particularly if your stamina is over 100, which it should be by the time you get one.

QuoteReply
# Oct 14 2001 at 4:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591755934571
64 posts
Hey Mandicus Defiance is Dwarf/Dragon faction and Frostbringer is Giant faction.... You see stats on a website I see the item in-game. Make your opinion after use one.

This item drops near the entrance to Chardok, between the entrance and the exit actually. The Captain has a couple PH's, the most common is a Di`zok Seargent or something very similar. And another named pops there that drops the di`zok wristsnapper. A very lucrative spawn area in terms of dropped items.

Of course this area is going to get Velked/Sebd into a laggy annoying place full of non helping people scurrying and squabling over spawns.

QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2001 at 5:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1642983438479
Scholar
263 posts
Although we did not get any drops off of him, we took him down and the AG with a low 50's group. Me (53necro), 56 cleric, 50 tank, 53 sham, 56 druid, and 52 mage. The tank was using a cane and slimy harp. This would have been a nice upgrade to either.

No, it was not an easy fight nor was this a farming group. Those who say only 57+ are farmers unwilling to take risks. We looked for a challenge. The first time we tried to break the room, we failed. The second time, and the next 3hours, were flawless.

just a dumb DENecro
